hero.title: Recruit Workers for Belarus Through an Official B2B Partnership
hero.desc: BUDEYA partners with licensed recruitment agencies in Nigeria, Pakistan, Bangladesh and Sri Lanka. We coordinate Belarusian employers, work invitations, visa documentation, arrival, accommodation and legal employment for candidates provided by our agency partners.
hero.b2bWarning: For recruitment agencies only. Individual job applications are not accepted.

visitorModal.title: Please select who you represent
visitorModal.desc: BUDEYA works exclusively with licensed recruitment agencies and international staffing partners.
visitorModal.jobSeekerBtn: I am looking for a job
visitorModal.jobSeekerTitle: Applications from individual job seekers are not accepted
visitorModal.jobSeekerDesc: BUDEYA does not accept direct applications from individual candidates. To apply for employment in Belarus, please contact a licensed recruitment agency in your country. Your local agency can then contact BUDEYA and submit your documents as part of an official partnership.

jobSeekerInfo.title: Are you an individual job seeker?
jobSeekerInfo.desc: BUDEYA does not accept direct applications from individual candidates. Please contact a licensed recruitment agency in your country. The agency can verify your documents, represent you and submit your application to BUDEYA through an official B2B partnership.
jobSeekerInfo.button: Find a licensed agency in your country
jobSeekerInfo.modalDesc: When looking for a recruitment agency, we recommend to:
tips: verify that the agency is officially registered;
do not send documents to unknown intermediaries;
confirm that the agency has an official partnership.

countries.title: Countries We Recruit From
countries.desc: We officially partner with leading international recruitment agencies and accept candidates from the following countries, providing full visa support and seamless local coordination.

professions.title: Candidate Profiles Requested From Partner Agencies
professions.desc: Partner agencies may submit candidates for the following professions. Each candidate must meet the stated requirements and provide complete documentation.
professions.videoRequirement: Partner agencies must provide a clear skills demonstration video for every candidate submitted for a skilled position.

masseuse.title: Masseuses (Spa & Wellness)
masseuse.desc: We are actively recruiting professional female masseuses for top-tier spas and wellness centers in Belarus. Partner agencies must provide video confirmation of candidates' skills.

professions.languageRequirement: English language proficiency is mandatory, Russian is desirable. Candidates with strong Russian language skills have the opportunity for employment as drivers, salespeople, and in all medical specialties.

services.title: Our Services
services.desc: Comprehensive legal and organizational support for labor migration to the Republic of Belarus.

b2b.title: Services for Recruitment Agencies
b2b.subtitle: Complete coordination between your agency, Belarusian employers and migration authorities.
list: Ongoing communication with the partner agency

steps.title: Partnership Request
steps.desc: The recruitment agency contacts BUDEYA and provides company information, country of operation and recruitment experience.

steps.title: Agency Verification
steps.desc: We verify the agency and discuss cooperation terms, candidate requirements and available positions.

steps.title: Cooperation Agreement
steps.desc: The parties sign an official B2B cooperation agreement.

steps.title: Candidate Submission
steps.desc: The partner agency submits candidate passports, CVs, skills videos and other required documents.

steps.title: Documents and Visa Coordination
steps.desc: BUDEYA coordinates Belarusian employers, work invitations, permits and visa documentation.

steps.title: Arrival and Employment
steps.desc: We coordinate arrival, transfer, accommodation, registration and legal employment in Belarus.

steps.title: Ongoing Partnership
steps.desc: BUDEYA remains in contact with the partner agency throughout the candidates’ employment period.

about.title: Why Choose Us?
about.desc1: We understand how important it is for partner agencies to follow a clear, legal process. Our mission is to make relocation and employment support transparent, organized, and compliant with the laws of the Republic of Belarus.
about.desc2: We handle all bureaucratic procedures with the Department of Citizenship and Migration in Belarus.

features.title: Legal Process
features.desc: Documents are prepared in accordance with the laws of the Republic of Belarus. No grey schemes.

features.title: Document Coordination
features.desc: We coordinate paperwork and interactions with migration services, including work invitation preparation.

features.title: Candidate Support
features.desc: We coordinate candidates' arrival, registration, medical checks, and adaptation before work starts.

list.q: Does BUDEYA work with individual job seekers?
list.a: No. BUDEYA works exclusively with licensed recruitment agencies and staffing partners. Individual candidates should contact an official recruitment agency in their country.

list.q: Which countries can become BUDEYA partners?
list.a: We currently cooperate with recruitment agencies from Nigeria, Pakistan, Bangladesh and Sri Lanka.

list.q: What information must an agency provide?
list.a: The agency should provide its company name, registration information, country, contact details, recruitment experience and information about available candidates.
Candidates are submitted by an approved partner agency after the cooperation terms have been agreed.

list.q: Can a candidate contact BUDEYA directly?
list.a: Candidates may read the information on the website, but applications and documents must be submitted through an approved recruitment agency.

list.q: Who pays for the candidate's flight?
list.a: Flights and consular fees are usually paid by the candidate or the sending agency. The Belarusian employer pays for the processing of permits within the country.
Employers provide dormitories that meet all sanitary standards. We monitor the living conditions and help candidates adapt.

list.q: How fast is the work invitation processed?
list.a: On average, the process of issuing a work permit and a special invitation takes 3 to 5 weeks from the moment the partner agency submits the full package of documents.

contact.subtitle: Become an Official Recruitment Partner
contact.desc: Represent a licensed recruitment agency? Contact BUDEYA to discuss candidate requirements, available positions and cooperation terms.
contact.warning: Individual job applications are not accepted.

footer.org: Official B2B coordination of international recruitment and legal employment in the Republic of Belarus.
